heading: Legal subdivisions mostly wet and unfit for cultivation
label: 984 Legal subdivisions mostly wet and unfit for cultivation
text: In making out lists and plats of the lands aforesaid all legal subdivisions, the greater part whereof is wet and unfit for cultivation, shall be included in said lists and plats, but when the greater part of a subdivision is not of that character, the whole of it shall be excluded therefrom.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2481 derived from , .act Sept. 28, 1850, ch. 84, § 39 Stat. 519
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 2481 derived from , .act Sept. 28, 1850, ch. 84, § 39 Stat. 519
